description: CompositionWhite round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with ribbed neckline, short sleeves and graphic on the chestFittingRegularWash care Machine wash at 40 degrees Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry normal or line dry Warm iron Go all out patriotic in this white tee from locomotive. The bold graphic of the letter A which represents America and the stars and stripes design plus the lettering pays homage to the troops. Team this with jeans and canvas shoes for a cool, casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
